label: Read File Contents
description: Read the full text content of a file in the vault.

function.name: read_file
function.description: Read the full text content of a file in the Obsidian vault. If the file has YAML frontmatter, it is also returned as a parsed JSON block at the top of the output. The file_path must be an exact vault-relative path (from the vault context or get_current_note).

file_path.description: The vault-relative path to the file (e.g. 'folder/note.md').
